title: Pack of 10 Christmas Pick Pine Cone Stick 50cm for Flower Arrangements and Table Decoration
features: Versatile Decor: Perfect for flower arrangements, table decorations, wreaths, and holiday crafts, these pine cone picks add a festive touch to any setting.
High-Quality Design: Each pick features a realistic pine cone ensuring your arrangements look natural and vibrant.
Ideal Size: With a 6cm diameter and a length of 50 cm, these picks seamlessly fit into both large and small displays, making them perfect for any occasion.
Pack of 10: With 10 picks included, you'll have plenty of options for creating stunning floral arrangements or decorating your home for the holidays.
Easy to Use: Simply insert the sticks into your desired arrangements for an effortless way to enhance your holiday decor.
description: Floralcraft Pine Cone Sticks are a perfect addition to your Christmas décor schemes, adding a traditional yet chic touch to the overall aesthetics. The Christmas Pick Pine Cone Sticks are made with the finest quality dense natural Indian pine cone that promises to withstand the wear and tear effortlessly. The pines are glued to the 50 cm sticks that make it easy to place in a vase or use for decoration purposes. The pine cone features a natural brown shade that makes it an undeniable focal point in any arrangement, making the overall appearance stand out. These sticks interestingly add a festive flair to bouquets, dried flowers, planted arrangements, table decorations, wreaths, garlands, and seasonal craft projects. The fine detailing of the pine cone creates a distinctive statement in any setting, elevating the overall look and feel of the décor arrangements.
